response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 20 years of technical leadership and proven ability to architect systems at scale, the resume lacks any evidence of experimentation platforms, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or measurement system design—all central to the Principal role. For a Principal-level position focused on growth and experimentation systems, domain-specific expertise is essential.
strengths: 20 years of experience with Staff/Principal-level roles and demonstrated technical leadership across web, mobile, desktop, and distributed systems
Proficiency in required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript) and recent infrastructure/framework work (MCP generators at re:cinq) shows ability to architect foundational systems
Documented scale experience: worked at Dunnhumby with microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating understanding of high-availability systems
concerns: Zero mention of experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flags, or rollout systems—the core deliverables of the role
No evidence of metrics infrastructure, telemetry platforms, statistical analysis, or bias detection work—required competencies for this Principal position

Recent roles (Optilyz pricing optimization, re:cinq full-stack/AI infrastructure) don't demonstrate the business-problem-to-measurable-engineering translation expected at Principal level for growth systems

key_factors.factor: 20+ years technical leadership and scale experience
No data aptitude, metrics, or telemetry experience documented
